riscv64-unknown-linux-musl-g++  -mcpu=c906fdv -march=rv64gcv0p7_zfh_xthead -mabi=lp64d  -Wl,-Map=model_detector.map "-Wl,-rpath,\$$ORIGIN/../../../../..//components/SeSg/open/lib" -Wl,-rpath,/home/recamera/sscma-example-sg200x/components/SeSg/open/lib -Wl,-rpath,/home/recamera/sdk_libs -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/system/lib -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/system/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/system/usr/lib/3rd CMakeFiles/model_detector.dir/dummy.c.o -o model_detector   -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/buildroot-2021.05/output/cvitek_CV181X_musl_riscv64/host/riscv64-buildroot-linux-musl/sysroot/usr/lib  -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/install/soc_sg2002_recamera_emmc/tpu_musl_riscv64/cvitek_tpu_sdk/lib  -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/install/soc_sg2002_recamera_emmc/rootfs/mnt/system/lib  -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_rtsp/install/lib  -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_mpi/lib  -L/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_mpi/lib/3rd  -Wl,-rpath,/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/buildroot-2021.05/output/cvitek_CV181X_musl_riscv64/host/riscv64-buildroot-linux-musl/sysroot/usr/lib:/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/install/soc_sg2002_recamera_emmc/tpu_musl_riscv64/cvitek_tpu_sdk/lib:/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/install/soc_sg2002_recamera_emmc/rootfs/mnt/system/lib:/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_rtsp/install/lib:/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_mpi/lib:/home/steven/sg2002_recamera_emmc/cvi_mpi/lib/3rd: libmain.a libsscma-micro.a -lmosquitto -lssl -lcrypto -lcviruntime libsophgo.a -lae -laf -latomic -lawb -lcvi_bin -lcvi_bin_isp -lgdc -lisp -lisp_algo -lsys -lvenc -lvpss -lvi -lvo -lraw_dump -lvdec -lrgn -lini -lcvi_ispd2 -ljson-c -lsns_ov5647 -lsns_gc2053 -lcares -lhv -lcvi_rtsp libudp_service.a
